key.name: shortcut
key.description: Shortcut to toggle the Lens for GNOME search bar.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show the Lens for GNOME icon in the top panel.

key.name: select-text-on-focus
key.description: Automatically select all text in the search bar when opening Lens for GNOME.

key.name: show-llm-animations
key.description: Show bouncing dots when the local LLM is actively synthesizing or filtering data.

key.name: enable-history
key.description: Save recent queries to display them in the tray indicator context menu.

key.name: search-history
key.description: Internal array of the most recent searches.

key.name: index-full-system
key.description: Whether to recursively index the entire home directory.

key.name: index-max-depth
key.description: How many directories deep the indexer is allowed to traverse.

key.name: index-paths
key.description: Specific directories to index if full system is disabled.

key.name: index-blacklist
key.description: Folder or file names that will be skipped during recursive index sweeps.

key.name: show-document-text
key.description: Toggle the display of the indexed text snippet in search results.

key.name: prioritize-folders
key.description: Force the background engine to always return a few folder matches if any exist.

key.name: show-result-shortcuts
key.description: Show numbers 1-9 next to search results for quick keyboard selection.

key.name: show-preview
key.description: Show a larger preview dialog when hovering over media files.

key.name: preview-x
key.description: Saved X coordinate for the preview window.

key.name: preview-y
key.description: Saved Y coordinate for the preview window.

key.name: preview-w
key.description: Saved width for the preview window.

key.name: preview-h
key.description: Saved height for the preview window.

key.name: lens-x
key.description: Saved X coordinate for the search window.

key.name: lens-y
key.description: Saved Y coordinate for the search window.

key.name: ui-color
key.description: Hex color code for the search window background.

key.name: ui-theme-path
key.description: Path to a .css file to customize the look and feel.

key.name: ui-transparency
key.description: Opacity level of the search window (10 to 100).

key.name: ui-shadow
key.description: Toggle the drop shadow of the search window.

key.name: show-backdrop
key.description: Dims the screen behind the Lens for GNOME search dialog.

key.name: ui-animation
key.description: Toggle opening and closing window animations.

key.name: ui-animation-type
key.description: Type of animation to use (standard, bounce, elastic).

key.name: enable-ai-filtering
key.description: Determines if the LLM should generate Rhai scripts to dynamically filter search results.

key.name: mail-account
key.description: Email address for Gmail sync.

key.name: mail-history-years
key.description: Limit the initial download to recent emails (Max 5 years).
